title: Onboarding manager with project configuration and graph visualization
purpose: Manages project onboarding by reading configuration files, deriving categories from file paths, and building file relationship graphs for visualization.
module_context: Exports types for onboarding configuration, learning paths, categories, and graph nodes/edges. Provides utility function to derive categories from file paths.

steps.content: IF explicit categories are provided in the configuration, return them directly.
ELSE group files by their parent directory paths.
FOR each directory group, create a category entry with the directory name and its associated file paths.
RETURN the list of derived categories.
Load the list of files from the pseudo database.
Initialize configuration with the file count from the loaded files.
IF a configuration file exists at the expected path, read and parse its contents.
MERGE the parsed configuration with the initial configuration.
UPDATE the file count in the configuration to match the current file list.
Load the list of files from the pseudo database.
Get the onboarding configuration for the project.
DERIVE categories from the loaded files using the configuration.
Load the call graph from the pseudo database.
Get the list of categories for the project.
MAP each node in the call graph to an onboarding graph node with category information.
RETURN the constructed graph with nodes and edges.
